---
title: "symsqrt"
generated: true
description: "Matrix square root of an SPD batch."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.linalg.spd`](../nitrix-linalg-spd.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:symsqrt -->
```python
symsqrt(input: Float[Array, '... d d'], *, psi: float = 0.0, key: Optional[jax.Array] = None, eigvalue_clip: EigvalueClip = 'auto') -> Float[Array, '... d d']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:symsqrt -->
Matrix square root of an SPD batch.

Applies $\sqrt{\cdot}$ to the eigenvalues via [`symmap`](../nitrix-linalg-spd/symmap.qmd).  The
scalar square root is undefined for negative reals; the default clipping
handles the boundary by flooring near-zero eigenvalues.  For genuinely
indefinite input the result is mathematically undefined and the negative
eigenvalues surface as `NaN`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:symsqrt -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `input` | `Float` | `...` √ó `d` √ó `d` | ‚Äî | Symmetric (assumed SPD) matrix batch. |
| `psi` | `float` | ‚Äî | `0.0` | Reconditioning strength forwarded to [`symmap`](../nitrix-linalg-spd/symmap.qmd). |
| `key` | `Optional[jax.Array]` | ‚Äî | `None` | PRNG key, required when `psi > 0`. |
| `eigvalue_clip` | `EigvalueClip` | ‚Äî | `'auto'` | Eigenvalue clipping policy forwarded to [`symmap`](../nitrix-linalg-spd/symmap.qmd). |

**Returns** `Float` ‚Äî shape `...` √ó `d` √ó `d`. The matrix square root of each input matrix; same shape as `input`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:symsqrt -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks ‚Äî nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **1.99 ms** (median, L4); up to **28.1√ó faster** than `scipy.linalg.sqrtm`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_SYMSQRT.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| symsqrt | jax-cpu | d=256 | `cupy.eigh_sqrtm` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| symsqrt | jax-cpu | d=256 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 5.11 ms / 6.29 ms | 199.96 ms | 527 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00044√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| symsqrt | jax-cpu | d=256 | `scipy.linalg.sqrtm` | ok | 19.98 ms / 47.16 ms | 131.27 ms | 471 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.0011√ótol | 3.91x vs nitrix-jax |
| symsqrt | jax-cuda12 | d=256 | `cupy.eigh_sqrtm` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| symsqrt | jax-cuda12 | d=256 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 1.97 ms / 1.99 ms | 820.95 ms | 72.09 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00042√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| symsqrt | jax-cuda12 | d=256 | `scipy.linalg.sqrtm` | ok | 44.54 ms / 180.83 ms | 3.892 s | 0.26 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.0011√ótol | 22.63x vs nitrix-jax |
| symsqrt | jax-cpu | d=512 | `cupy.eigh_sqrtm` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| symsqrt | jax-cpu | d=512 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 21.82 ms / 167.38 ms | 948.52 ms | 545 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00068√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| symsqrt | jax-cpu | d=512 | `scipy.linalg.sqrtm` | ok | 169.20 ms / 216.27 ms | 292.35 ms | 473 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.0014√ótol | 7.75x vs nitrix-jax |
| symsqrt | jax-cuda12 | d=512 | `cupy.eigh_sqrtm` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| symsqrt | jax-cuda12 | d=512 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 4.30 ms / 4.32 ms | 1.072 s | 74.45 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00049√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| symsqrt | jax-cuda12 | d=512 | `scipy.linalg.sqrtm` | ok | 120.89 ms / 121.39 ms | 221.63 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.0014√ótol | 28.10x vs nitrix-jax |
| symsqrt | jax-cpu | d=64 | `cupy.eigh_sqrtm` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| symsqrt | jax-cpu | d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 322.1 ¬µs / 328.7 ¬µs | 173.23 ms | 517 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00044√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| symsqrt | jax-cpu | d=64 | `scipy.linalg.sqrtm` | ok | 1.06 ms / 1.09 ms | 1.25 ms | 471 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.0011√ótol | 3.30x vs nitrix-jax |
| symsqrt | jax-cuda12 | d=64 | `cupy.eigh_sqrtm` | ok | 704.3 ¬µs / 706.2 ¬µs | 553.56 ms | 0.02 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00049√ótol | 0.94x vs nitrix-jax |
| symsqrt | jax-cuda12 | d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 751.6 ¬µs / 755.6 ¬µs | 526.15 ms | 71.35 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00047√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| symsqrt | jax-cuda12 | d=64 | `scipy.linalg.sqrtm` | ok | 1.07 ms / 1.08 ms | 1.24 ms | 0.02 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.0011√ótol | 1.42x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `daec36e9` ¬∑ nitrix `fcbe94d3`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:symsqrt -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
